title: Covert Lethal Operation Ordered Against US Citizen — Warrant Denied
description: The CIA orders a covert lethal operation targeting a United States citizen abroad. Under Article XI Section 5.2, no such operation may proceed without a judicial warrant issued upon probable cause that the citizen poses an imminent and specific threat and that capture is not feasible. A warrant application is filed. The court denies the warrant, finding that capture remains feasible. The operation proceeds anyway. The Accountability Commission opens prosecution of the responsible officers.
